_purpose: Operator-recorded explicit redistribution consent for license=None HF datasets. See aurelius/ingestion/operator_redistribution_policy.py and docs/HF_DATASET_REGISTRY.md (Operator Redistribution Policy section).
_default_behaviour: deny_all. With zero grants below, every license=None HF dataset remains BLOCKED for ingestion — same behaviour as before this policy file landed.

_grant_schema.granted: bool — true to grant, false to record an explicit deny
_grant_schema.granted_at_iso: string — ISO-8601 UTC timestamp (required when granted=true)
_grant_schema.allowed_scopes: list[string] — subset of _supported_scopes the operator consents to
_grant_schema.notes: string — operator rationale, redistribution source, contact
_grant_schema.expires_at_iso: string|null — optional ISO-8601 expiry; if present and in the past, the grant is denied

_safety_invariants: every grant must be per-dataset (no wildcards)
granted=true requires non-empty granted_by AND granted_at_iso
allowed_scopes must be a subset of _supported_scopes
